zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela d'Oyri於1196年12月14日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德尼 希爾時，她的父親Fulco Oilly44歲，母親Matilda le Strange42歲。她於1217年與William de Beaumont III在英國英格蘭諾福爾可德雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1220年在英國素福爾可阿辛頓享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela d'Oyri于1196年12月14日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾德尼 希爾时，她的父亲Fulco Oilly44岁，母亲Matilda le Strange42岁。她于1217年与William de Beaumont III在英国英格兰諾福爾可德雷頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1220年在英国素福爾可阿辛頓享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: of uncertain derivation. It is thought in part to be a combination of elements from   Elizabeth   and   Mary ;  in part a feminine equivalent of   Elmer .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela d'Oyri was born on 14 December 1196, in Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Fulco Oilly, was 44 and her mother, Matilda le Strange, was 42. She married William de Beaumont III in 1217, in Drayton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1220, in Assington, Suffolk, England, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela d'Oyri est née le 14 décembre 1196, à Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulco Oilly, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Matilda le Strange, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé William de Beaumont III en 1217, à Drayton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Assington, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.Gedney Manor, Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire,: Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ela d'Oyri am 14. Dezember 1196 in Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulco Oilly 44 und ihre Mutter Matilda le Strange 42. Sie hat 1217 in Drayton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom William de Beaumont III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1220 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Assington, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ela d'Oyri è nata il il 14 dicembre 1196 nel Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Fulco Oilly, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Matilda le Strange, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato William de Beaumont III nel 1217, nel Drayton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1220, nel Assington, Suffolk, England, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela d'Oyriが1196年12月14日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアジェドニー ヒルで生まれた時，父Fulco Oillyは44歳，母Matilda le Strangeは42歳であった。1217年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクドレイトンでWilliam de Beaumont IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1220年にイギリススフォルクアシントンで24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela d'Oyri(이)가 1196년 12월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게드니 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulco Oilly(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda le Strange(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 드라이턴에서 William de Beaumont III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 영국 수폴크 아징턴에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela d'Oyri nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1196, em Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulco Oilly, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Matilda le Strange, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Beaumont III em 1217, em Drayton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1220, em Assington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 24 anos.

ro.Gedney Manor, Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire,: Gedney Hill, Lincolnshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela d'Oyri родилась 14 декабря 1196 г. в местности джедни хилл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Fulco Oilly было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda le Strange, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Beaumont III в 1217 г. в местности дреитон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности ассингтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 24 лет.

Se casó con William de Beaumont III en 1217, en Drayton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1220, en Assington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años.
